"[12] Incident 260307EC0049 was reopened. Comment: Incident Reopened : ^CT632 -- CREW HAS RE-CLOSED THE EB LN and WILL BE CONT 1-WAY TRFC CONTROL UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE / RDWY IS TOO UNDERMINED FOR HEAVY VEH TRFC TO CONT DRIVING OVER IT / CONSTRUCTION WILL BE TAKING OVER TO MAKE ADDL REPAIRS; THEIR ETA IS 1900-2000 HRS, CT632 CREW WILL HOLD THE CLSR UNTIL THEN"
